references.title: UI refresh
references.borrowed: Calmer navigation chrome, stronger scan hierarchy, and less noisy framing for dense route facts.
references.rejected: Did not borrow issue-tracker metaphors, dark-heavy default styling, or product-centric inbox language.

references.title: Welcome to the new Linear
references.borrowed: Clearer hierarchy between chrome, active pane, and secondary context without turning the surface into a workbench.
references.rejected: Did not adopt branded product sheen or dense B2B toolbar behavior.

references.title: Nested Layouts
references.borrowed: Persistent shell chrome and child-route continuity without losing the owning request or cluster context.
references.rejected: Did not mirror Vercel’s developer-dashboard information architecture.

references.title: New dashboard redesign is now the default
references.borrowed: Efficient section chrome and stable peer-route transitions with minimal visual noise.
references.rejected: Did not use project-switching, floating mobile navigation, or dashboard-specific filtering metaphors.

references.title: Data table
references.borrowed: Dense but readable row scanning and disciplined summary-to-detail layout for chronology and callback facts.
references.rejected: Did not turn the patient route into a table-first admin console.

references.title: Writing NHS messages
references.borrowed: Plain-spoken, service-grade wording that explains what happens next without internal jargon.
references.rejected: Avoided abstract system language or reassurance that outruns the real care workflow.

references.title: Typography
references.borrowed: Disciplined heading and body hierarchy for long-form patient explanations and structured summaries.
references.rejected: Did not import NHS branding or public-site composition directly.
